days.label: Push Day — Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 125 — set 3 broke at 8 reps last week (bottom of range, RPE 9). Hit 10/10/10 with clean form to earn the bump next week.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 35 — clean 10/10/10 but RPE 8 on first two sets. Get all sets to RPE 7 to go up. 30 degree incline.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in for OHP this week. OHP was RPE 9-10 last week so giving the strict press a break. 25 lb DB each hand to start; adjust if first set is too easy or too hard.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Back to laterals after a week of front raises. Slight bend in elbows, control the negative. Pick a weight you can hit 10-12 with at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 95 — set 3 broke at 9 reps last week (in range, RPE 9). Hit 10/10/10 to earn the bump. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in from kickbacks. Use the cable, split the rope at the bottom, full lockout. Pick a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps — 5 min

days.label: Pull Day — Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: UP 10 lb from 185 — earned it with 10/10/10 RPE 6/7/7 last week. Brace hard, pull through the floor, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 — solid 10/10/10 but set 3 RPE 9. One more week here. Each side, squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in for dumbbell pullover. Wide grip on lat bar, pull bar to upper chest, squeeze lats. Pick weight for 8-10 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: NEW — moving from band to cable for progressive loading. Rope at upper pulley, pull to face, external rotation at the end.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 60 — clean 10/10/10 but set 3 RPE 9. Need RPE 7 across the board to bump up. Strict form, no swing.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 25 — hit 12/12/11 (in range) but set 3 RPE 10. Note: previous target was 27.5 but DB increments are 5 lb only — keeping at 25 lb until you crush it RPE 7.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back — 5 min

days.label: Leg Day — Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 — clean 8/8/8 RPE 8 across last week (in range, not at top). Push for 9-10 reps to earn the bump. Below parallel.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: NEW — barbell version, rotating in for DB RDL. Slight knee bend, slide bar down thighs, feel hamstring stretch. 135 lb to start; adjust if too easy/hard.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 20 — crushed 12/12/12 RPE 6/7/7 last week. Each leg, rear foot on bench.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: DOWN 10 lb from 65 — set 3 broke at 7 reps RPE 10 last week (well below range). Drive through heels, squeeze at top, control the descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Calf Raises
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating from barbell to DB. Single-leg for extra challenge. Hold DB at side, raise heel high, pause at top.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: NEW — replacing ab wheel after only 5 reps possible last week (RPE 10). Easier core stability work. Keep lower back pressed to floor, slow and controlled.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors — 5 min
